rationale: The citing paper uses Bruno et al. (2012) repeatedly in its organizational-buying literature positioning, not just in a generic background list. It identifies Bruno et al. as representative prior B2B transactional work that treats decision making with an as-if unitary buyer and does not model multiple stakeholders inside organizations. This contrast is central to motivating the new multistakeholder structural model and the paper's claimed contribution.
relation_description: The citing paper positions its contribution against Bruno et al. (2012) by arguing that prior B2B models rely on unitary-buyer assumptions. It proposes a multistakeholder framework (buyers and users) to address that limitation in organizational buying settings.
